name: Integration - Business Rule Failure (Ineligible Customer)
description: Tests that the agent returns a failure response when the business rule engine marks a customer as ineligible.
input: POST /crm/quote with customerEmailId set to 'ineligible@example.com' and all other required fields valid.
output: 200 OK with success: true and data containing status: FAIL, errors indicating ineligibility, and missingInputs.
success_criteria: Response data includes error about customer ineligibility
